title: Display Delight Fabric
description: Allows to place every food item in Farmer's Delight and friends in 3D
body:
# Display Delight Fabric

A port of the NeoForge mod [https://modrinth.com/mod/display-delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/display-delight).

Allows you to place many different foods from farmers delight and their add ons as 3D models, including stackable plates that allow you to store multiple foods in one spot aesthetically. Wandering trader support is also added for blocks that come from mods that are not present.

![From the original mod description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30e826909c38e8846fb0c3f8592e4f7968bd77dd_0.webp)

Currently, the mod only supports Minecraft version **26.1.2**, **1.21.1**, **1.21.11**, and **1.20.1**.

## Mechanics
  * Wandering traders are able to sell food blocks
  * Right click with empty hand to take one food if mod is loaded
    * Sneak right click to take everything
  * Right click with food on plate to place one food
    * Sneak right click to place everything
  * Swap food on small plates with your held food
  * Pick block to pick the food if mod is loaded, otherwise picks the block
    * Sneak pick block to always pick the block
  * Some food can be placed on top of each other and on other blocks which may require support
  * You can use silk touch to get the block itself, but only if the block has the max stack of food
  * You can use an axe to hide the plates of certain food blocks
    * Insert the right food plate to show the plate again
    * If the mod isn't loaded, the axe won't take durability nor take the plate

## Compatibility
The mod adds in multiple blocks from different mods, but some mods are not available on certain Minecraft versions or on Fabric. In these cases, the placeable foods will drop their model and not the item. Wandering traders also allow you to get blocks from other mods not present.

* The following mods have blocks added:
    *   Farmer's Delight
    *   Ocean Delight
    *   Pineapple Delight
    *   Corn Delight    
    *   Delightful
    *   Expanded Delight
    *   Cultural Delights
    *   Festive Delights
    *   Alex Delight
    *   Large Meals
    *   Brewin n Chewin
    *   Aquacultural Delight
    *   End's Delight
    *   Ender Delight
    *   Crabber's Delight
    *   My Nether's Delight
    *   Nether Delight

# Credits

Credits go to [the original mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/display-delight), linked above, for the assets and parts of the code (modified).
